tools.name: web_research
tools.description: Web research: searches the web and returns a concise cited brief answering your query. LLM-synthesized on independent hardware. Paid: $0.02 per call via x402 (payment in _meta['x402/payment']).

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Summarize any text (up to ~24k chars) with optional focus. Paid: $0.01 per call via x402.

tools.name: extract_structured
tools.description: Extract structured JSON from unstructured text, guided by your schema description. Paid: $0.01 per call via x402.
